requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Approval — EV Supply Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全批准——电动汽车供电设备
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全批准——電動汽車供電設備

summary.en: EV charging equipment installed or sold in Canada is normally required by provincial and territorial electrical safety law to be approved, certified, or field-evaluated by a recognized certification or inspection body before connection to the electrical supply. The Standards Council of Canada accredits product certification bodies that certify electrical products for the Canadian market. CSA C22.2 No. 280, UL 2202, and UL 2594 are commonly used CSA/UL binational EV charger safety standards for EV supply equipment and DC charging equipment; the standards are voluntary technical routes and certification evidence, while the mandatory obligation comes from applicable electrical safety legislation and inspection rules.
summary.zh: 在加拿大安装或销售的电动汽车充电设备，通常须依据省和地区电气安全法规，在接入电源前由认可的认证或检验机构批准、认证或现场评估。加拿大标准委员会（SCC）认可为加拿大市场电气产品提供认证的产品认证机构。CSA C22.2 No. 280、UL 2202和UL 2594是电动汽车供电设备及直流充电设备常用的CSA/UL双边安全标准；这些标准是自愿技术路径和认证证据，强制性义务来自适用的电气安全法规及检验规则。
summary.zht: 在加拿大安裝或銷售的電動汽車充電設備，通常須依據省和地區電氣安全法規，在接入電源前由認可的認證或檢驗機構批准、認證或現場評估。加拿大標準委員會（SCC）認可為加拿大市場電氣產品提供認證的產品認證機構。CSA C22.2 No. 280、UL 2202和UL 2594是電動汽車供電設備及直流充電設備常用的CSA/UL雙邊安全標準；這些標準是自願技術路徑和認證證據，強制性義務來自適用的電氣安全法規及檢驗規則。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety legislation and inspection rules
SCC-accredited product certification or field evaluation for electrical products
CSA C22.2 No. 280 — Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
UL 2594 / CSA C22.2 No. 280 — Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
UL 2202 / CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 — Electric Vehicle Charging System Equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487 series charger system standards and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with domestic certification or testing under Chinese conformity-assessment schemes. Chinese GB/T reports and CCC or voluntary CQC documentation are not automatically accepted as Canadian electrical approval because Canadian inspection authorities expect evidence tied to Canadian-recognized certification marks, SCC-accredited certification bodies, or accepted field evaluation.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 18487系列充电系统标准和GB/T 20234接口标准，并依据中国合格评定体系进行国内认证或测试。中国GB/T报告以及CCC或自愿性CQC文件不会自动被视为加拿大电气批准，因为加拿大检验机构通常要求与加拿大认可认证标志、SCC认可认证机构或被接受的现场评估相关联的证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 18487系列充電系統標準和GB/T 20234接口標準，並依據中國合格評定體系進行國內認證或測試。中國GB/T報告以及CCC或自願性CQC文件不會自動被視為加拿大電氣批准，因為加拿大檢驗機構通常要求與加拿大認可認證標誌、SCC認可認證機構或被接受的現場評估相關聯的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
GB/T 18487.5 — DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3
GB/T 20234 series — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles
China CCC or voluntary CQC documentation for EV charging equipment

gap.en: A China-market charger should be reviewed against Canadian electrical approval expectations before import or installation. The practical gap is not simply re-labelling: creepage and clearance, enclosure rating, abnormal-operation testing, grounding/bonding, branch-circuit protection, markings, and installation instructions may need Canadian-standard evidence. CSA/UL standards support certification and presumption of safety acceptability, but they are not mandatory law by themselves.
gap.zh: 中国市场充电设备在进口或安装前应按加拿大电气批准预期进行评审。实际差距并非简单换标：爬电距离和电气间隙、外壳等级、异常运行测试、接地/等电位连接、分支电路保护、标识及安装说明可能均需加拿大标准证据。CSA/UL标准支持认证和安全可接受性的推定，但其本身不是强制法律。
gap.zht: 中國市場充電設備在進口或安裝前應按加拿大電氣批准預期進行評審。實際差距並非簡單換標：爬電距離和電氣間隙、外殼等級、異常運行測試、接地/等電位連接、分支電路保護、標識及安裝說明可能均需加拿大標準證據。CSA/UL標準支持認證和安全可接受性的推定，但其本身不是強制法律。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: electrical approval before sale, installation, or energization where required by provincial or territorial law and inspection rules. CSA C22.2 No. 280, UL 2202, and UL 2594 are voluntary binational technical standards and certification routes used to demonstrate safety; they are not mandatory legal obligations by themselves.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or certification-driven for China domestic market where covered by Chinese conformity-assessment rules; not accepted as Canadian approval by itself

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T or CCC evidence does not by itself satisfy Canadian electrical safety approval. A Canadian-recognized certification mark or accepted field evaluation tied to Canadian requirements is normally needed before installation or energization.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国GB/T或CCC证据本身不满足加拿大电气安全批准要求。通常需要与加拿大要求相对应的加拿大认可认证标志或被接受的现场评估，方可安装或通电。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國GB/T或CCC證據本身不滿足加拿大電氣安全批准要求。通常需要與加拿大要求相對應的加拿大認可認證標誌或被接受的現場評估，方可安裝或通電。

requirement_topic.en: CSA/UL Binational EV Charger Standards — Voluntary Presumption Route
requirement_topic.zh: CSA/UL双边电动汽车充电设备标准——自愿推定路径
requirement_topic.zht: CSA/UL雙邊電動汽車充電設備標準——自願推定路徑

summary.en: CSA Group publishes Canadian electrical standards used by certification bodies and inspection authorities for EV charging equipment. For Canada, CSA C22.2 No. 280 / UL 2594 is commonly associated with AC EV supply equipment, and UL 2202 is commonly associated with DC charging system equipment. These standards are technical certification references; Canadian law usually requires approved electrical equipment, not use of one named standard to the exclusion of equivalent accepted evidence.
summary.zh: CSA Group发布供认证机构和检验机构用于电动汽车充电设备的加拿大电气标准。在加拿大，CSA C22.2 No. 280 / UL 2594通常与交流电动汽车供电设备相关，UL 2202通常与直流充电系统设备相关。这些标准是技术认证参考；加拿大法律通常要求电气设备获得批准，而不是排他性强制使用某一项指定标准。
summary.zht: CSA Group發布供認證機構和檢驗機構用於電動汽車充電設備的加拿大電氣標準。在加拿大，CSA C22.2 No. 280 / UL 2594通常與交流電動汽車供電設備相關，UL 2202通常與直流充電系統設備相關。這些標準是技術認證參考；加拿大法律通常要求電氣設備獲得批准，而不是排他性強制使用某一項指定標準。

standards_or_laws: CSA C22.2 No. 280 / UL 2594 — Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
UL 2202 — Electric Vehicle Charging System Equipment
CSA C22.2 Canadian Electrical Code product standards used for certification

summary.en: Chinese test portfolios often map to GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234, with DC communication under GB/T 27930. Even where a Chinese report uses IEC-derived clauses, Canada-market certification typically requires direct review to Canadian deviations, North American supply characteristics, Canadian markings, and Canadian installation assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国测试资料通常映射至GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234，并以GB/T 27930处理直流通信。即使中国报告采用源自IEC的条款，加拿大市场认证通常仍需直接评审加拿大差异、北美供电特性、加拿大标识以及加拿大安装假设。
summary.zht: 中國測試資料通常映射至GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234，並以GB/T 27930處理直流通訊。即使中國報告採用源自IEC的條款，加拿大市場認證通常仍需直接評審加拿大差異、北美供電特性、加拿大標識以及加拿大安裝假設。

gap.en: The Canadian evidence package should be built around a certification body's accepted Canadian standard matrix. A GB/T-only file normally lacks binational CSA/UL clause mapping, Canadian caution markings, installation warnings, supply ratings, and bilingual documentation expected for inspection and market surveillance.
gap.zh: 加拿大证据包应围绕认证机构接受的加拿大标准矩阵建立。仅有GB/T文件通常缺少CSA/UL双边条款映射、加拿大警示标识、安装警告、供电额定值以及检验和市场监管所需的双语文件。
gap.zht: 加拿大證據包應圍繞認證機構接受的加拿大標準矩陣建立。僅有GB/T文件通常缺少CSA/UL雙邊條款映射、加拿大警示標識、安裝警告、供電額定值以及檢驗和市場監管所需的雙語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: approved electrical equipment where required by provincial or territorial law. CSA C22.2 No. 280, UL 2202, and UL 2594 are voluntary technical standards used for certification and presumption of safety acceptability; they are not mandatory legal obligations by themselves.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T standards and certification schemes apply to China domestic compliance, not Canadian approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CSA/UL binational standards are the expected technical route for many Canada-market EV chargers, but the legal gate is electrical approval under the relevant Canadian jurisdiction. Treat the standards as voluntary presumption or certification evidence, not as standalone mandatory law.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】CSA/UL双边标准是许多加拿大市场电动汽车充电设备的预期技术路径，但法律门槛是相关加拿大辖区的电气批准。应将这些标准视为自愿推定或认证证据，而非独立强制法律。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】CSA/UL雙邊標準是許多加拿大市場電動汽車充電設備的預期技術路徑，但法律門檻是相關加拿大轄區的電氣批准。應將這些標準視為自願推定或認證證據，而非獨立強制法律。
